28:
SELECT school_name, DOCType
FROM (
    SELECT
        s.School AS school_name,
        s.DOCType,
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS diff
    FROM frpm f
    JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
      AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
      AND f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE diff > (SELECT AVG(diff) FROM (
    SELECT
        f."Enrollment (K-12)" - f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" AS diff
    FROM frpm f
    JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE s.FundingType = 'Local'
      AND f."Enrollment (K-12)" IS NOT NULL
      AND f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)" IS NOT NULL
) inner_sub);	----- bird -----	california_schools

) c

        SELECT County, COUNT(*) AS closed_cnt

) m ON c.County = m.County
ORDER BY c.School;	----- bird -----	california_schools

84:
SELECT first_name, District
FROM (
  SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
) admins
JOIN (
  SELECT first_name
  FROM (
    SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName2 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT AdmFName3 FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
  )
  GROUP BY first_name
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT 2
) top ON admins.first_name = top.first_name
ORDER BY first_name, District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

WITH oldest_female AS (
  SELECT client_id
  FROM client
  WHERE gender = 'F'
    AND birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F')
),
min_salary AS (
  SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS min_sal
  FROM oldest_female of
  JOIN client c ON c.client_id = of.client_id
  JOIN district d ON d.district_id = c.district_id
)
SELECT a.account_id,
       (SELECT MAX(A11) FROM district) - (SELECT min_sal FROM min_salary) AS gap
FROM account a
JOIN disp dsp ON dsp.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN oldest_female of ON of.client_id = dsp.client_id
JOIN client c ON c.client_id = of.client_id
JOIN district d ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE d.A11 = (SELECT min_sal FROM min_salary);	----- bird -----	financial

        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards c JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid WHERE fd.language = 'Spanish') AS spanish_cards
)
SELECT c.name,
       CAST(t.spanish_cards AS REAL) * 100.0 / t.total_cards AS spanish_percentage
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid

ORDER BY c.name;	----- bird -----	card_games

518:
WITH banned_counts AS (
  SELECT l.format, COUNT(*) AS banned_cnt
  FROM legalities l
  WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  GROUP BY l.format
),
max_banned AS (
  SELECT MAX(banned_cnt) AS max_cnt FROM banned_counts
)
SELECT bc.format, c.name
FROM banned_counts bc
JOIN max_banned mb ON bc.banned_cnt = mb.max_cnt
JOIN legalities l ON l.format = bc.format AND l.status = 'Banned'
JOIN cards c ON c.uuid = l.uuid
ORDER BY bc.format, c.name;	----- bird -----	card_games

WITH race AS (
  SELECT raceId FROM races WHERE year = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champ_time AS (
  SELECT time FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race) AND position = 1 AND time IS NOT NULL
),
last_time AS (
  SELECT time FROM results WHERE raceId = (SELECT raceId FROM race) AND time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY position DESC LIMIT 1
),
champ_sec AS (
  SELECT 
    (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':'))-1 AS INTEGER) * 3600) +
    (CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':'))-1 AS INTEGER) * 60) +
    (CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.'))-1 AS INTEGER)) +
    (CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.')+1) AS REAL) / 1000) AS seconds
  FROM champ_time
),
last_sec AS (
  SELECT 
    (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':'))-1 AS INTEGER) * 3600) +
    (CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':'))-1 AS INTEGER) * 60) +
    (CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), 1, INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.'))-1 AS INTEGER)) +
    (CAST(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':')+1), ':')+1), '.')+1) AS REAL) / 1000) AS seconds
  FROM last_time
)
SELECT ((l.seconds - c.seconds) / l.seconds) * 100 AS percent_faster
FROM champ_sec c, last_sec l;	----- bird -----	formula_1

1481:
WITH cust_consumption AS (
    SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
      AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
seg_min AS (
    SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
    FROM cust_consumption
    GROUP BY Segment
),
seg_avg AS (
    SELECT cc.Segment, AVG(cc.total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM cust_consumption cc
    JOIN seg_min sm ON cc.Segment = sm.Segment AND cc.total_consumption = sm.min_total
    GROUP BY cc.Segment
)
SELECT
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
WITH cust AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, Segment
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'EUR'
      AND Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
),
ym AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, y.Date, y.Consumption,
           substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN cust c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
),
agg AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN Consumption END) AS cons_2012,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN Consumption END) AS cons_2013
    FROM ym
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT Segment,
       ROUND(((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0) / cons_2013, 2) AS pct_increase
FROM agg
WHERE cons_2013 IS NOT NULL AND cons_2012 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1

UNION ALL

SELECT Segment,
       ROUND(((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0) / cons_2013, 2) AS pct_increase
FROM agg
WHERE cons_2013 IS NOT NULL AND cons_2012 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1526:
WITH cust AS (
  SELECT CustomerID
  FROM transactions_1k
  WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
),
cons_2012 AS (
  SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS cons2012
  FROM yearmonth
  WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM cust)
    AND Date LIKE '2012-%'
),
cons_2013 AS (
  SELECT SUM(Consumption) AS cons2013
  FROM yearmonth
  WHERE CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM cust)
    AND Date LIKE '2013-%'
)
SELECT (cons2012 - cons2013) / cons2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM cons_2012, cons_2013;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

1531:
SELECT c.CustomerID,
       c.Currency,
       cs.total_price / cs.total_amount AS avg_price_per_item
FROM (
    SELECT t.CustomerID,
           SUM(t.Price) AS total_price,
           SUM(t.Amount) AS total_amount
    FROM transactions_1k t
    GROUP BY t.CustomerID
) cs
JOIN customers c ON cs.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
ORDER BY cs.total_price DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
